MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2019 Vacated

Notice And Motion For An Order Approving Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq. 415-693-9107 of Klein Law Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DANILO VILAMIZAR's Motion For An Order Approving Paga Settlement.

Granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Continued To Apr-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice And Motion For An Order Approving Settlement Of Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Danilo Vilamizar's motion to approve settlement of his PAGA claims with defendant Rodriguez Resource Corporation, Inc. is granted. Mr. Vilamizar has shown sufficient grounds to warrant the approval of the settlement. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
